title: Jsdoin Professional Kitchen Garlic Press/Mincer/Crusher UK, Peeler Squeezer Heavy Duty Garlic Presser,User-Friendly Chopper, Easy to Clean and Durable
features: [Size] - Length p6,1 inches; the round print head diameter η1,2 Zol
[Material] - Jsdoin The garlic press is made of zinc alloy, is light and robust. You do not have to worry about the rust of the garlic press.

[Easy to use] - Our garlic press is ergonomically designed. You can squeeze garlic into chopped garlic by simply squeezing it together. At the same time, it is very easy to clean. Simply rinse it with clean water or place it in the dishwasher to clean it.
[Good choice as gift] - Jsdoin garlic press can not only be a good helper in your kitchen, but also as a gift for your friends and relatives.
We do not recommend using garlic that exceeds the size of the product specification area.
description: Product Description CRUSH GARLIC WITH EASE No more straining your hand, desperately trying to crush a single clove of garlic. A strong and ergonomic design allows you to crush multiple garlic cloves at once. Can't be bothered to remove to peel? Not a problem! Crush garlic or ginger fast STRONG, STURDY & LONG LASTING Ergonomic Handle with heavy duty construction & ergonomic designed, you can mince unpeeled garlic easily.Have you been through multiple garlic mincers and thrown them out time and time again? Only for the next one to break with the slightest force? Not anymore. SAVE TONS OF YOUR TIME Jsdoin saves you all the time you would have spent chopping up the garlic yourself. You can press fresh cloves of garlic even the really big ones! Dishwasher Safe. Jsdoin garlic press ginger press kitchen utensil kitchen tool Easy to use, put clove of garlic or ginger in the funnel and squeeze! Great gift for aspiring chefs. Versatile culinary tool for the kitchen at home, in the café or in the restaurant. Dimensions: L 15cm, W 2.7cm, H 3.3cm The pins on the press ensure a higher yield of pressed garlic Easy to clean in the sink or dishwasher Heavy metal design Suitable for unpeeled garlic cloves. Contains ： 1x garlic press
